highlights.title: Local EPUB import and reading
highlights.description: Import EPUB books, save cover and chapter metadata, and open books with the Foliate reader.

highlights.title: Paragraph-level annotation anchors
highlights.description: Structured book indexing and paragraph anchors keep annotations, highlights, and AI outputs attached to stable chapter passages.

highlights.title: Spoiler control and reading context
highlights.description: Added spoiler scope controls and reading context packaging to reduce context drift in long books.

highlights.title: Assistant dock and annotation navigation
highlights.description: Added the assistant reading dock, annotation navigation shortcuts, and long annotation collapse.
